/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -O3 -D_GLIBCXX_USE_CXX11_ABI=0 -shared -Wl,-soname,libcuda_ipc_utils.so -o libcuda_ipc_utils.so CMakeFiles/cuda_ipc_utils.dir/block_migration.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cuda_ipc_utils.dir/zero_copy.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cuda_ipc_utils.dir/py_nccl.cc.o   -L/usr/local/cuda/lib64  -L/docker/anaconda3/envs/epd/lib/python3.10/site-packages/torch/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/cuda/lib64:/docker/anaconda3/envs/epd/lib/python3.10/site-packages/torch/lib -lc10 -ltorch -ltorch_cpu -ltorch_cuda -lc10_cuda -lnccl
